recalibration_applied.method: judge score recalibration: +3.58 applied to wp_judge overall scores (bf16-merge inference-path calibration artifact, D-V4-09). Equivalent to evaluating raw scores at threshold 66.42 instead of policy 70.0.

REVL-01A_spearman.note: rho 0.240 < 0.263 bar (D-V4-04). UNCHANGED by recalibration — Spearman is a rank metric; a uniform score offset is rank-invariant (verified: spearman(score+3.58, gt_canonical) == spearman(score, gt_canonical) == 0.2401). Residual: noise-band fail (CI [0.061, 0.410] spans the bar; P(fail)=0.60). Not causal for promotion decision without human waiver.

REVL-02_phpcs.note: phpcs 0.9412 < 0.98 (baseline 1.0 - 2pp). UNCHANGED by recalibration — codegen gate is independent of judge calibration. Residual: small-N (1/17 failures; binomial 95% CI spans the bar). Not causal for promotion decision without human waiver.

sentinel_false_pass.note: 0/24 policy false-pass at recalibrated threshold 66.42. CONFIRMED SAFE under recalibration: raw_false_pass=0 at score-threshold 60 means all 24 should-fail prompts scored <60 well below 66.42. Sentinel gate PASSES under recalibration (unchanged).

confusion_pareto.note: Recalibrated: recall 0.845 PASSES (>=0.638), false_FAIL 0.452 FAILS (>0.403 limit). Improved from 0.468 to 0.452 (rescued 1 case in [66.42,70) score band). Explicit-FAIL token floor prevents further improvement: most false-FAIL cases have model_raw='FAIL' (unaffected by score threshold). Confusion gate remains FAILED post-recalibration.

REVL-03_reasoning_quality.note: SOFT - coherence above 0.80 CI lower bound. Unchanged from original verdict.

REVL-06_fix_correctness.note: 0 corrected_code rows; judge-only model; N/A with rationale. Unchanged.

REVL-07_classification.note: SOFT - recalibrated false_fail improved to 0.452 from 0.468; good recall maintained.

per_dim_knowledge_dip.note: VISIBILITY flag for human reviewer (D-V4-06); not auto-block. Unchanged.

automated_pass_formula: AND(REVL-01A.pass, REVL-02.pass, REVL-04.pass, sentinel.pass, confusion.pass) = AND(false, false, true, true, false) = false
recalibration_confirmed_safe: sentinel (was already passing; policy_false_pass=0 confirmed still holds at thr=66.42)
recalibration_improved_but_not_cleared: confusion_pareto (false_FAIL 0.468 -> 0.452; explicit-FAIL floor prevents clearing; still > 0.403 bar)
residual_blockers: REVL-01A_spearman: noise-band fail (CI [0.061,0.410] spans bar 0.263; P(fail)=0.60; rank-invariant, not recalibratable). Human waiver required.
REVL-02_phpcs: small-N fail (1/17; binomial non-binding statistically). Human waiver required.
confusion_pareto: improved 0.468->0.452 but still > 0.403 (explicit-FAIL token floor; recalibration cannot rescue token-level FAIL verdicts). Human waiver required.
consequence: automated_pass=false after recalibration. REVL-01A (noise-band, rank-invariant) + REVL-02 (small-N codegen) + confusion (improved but not cleared) remain FAIL. REVL-05 human review is still GATED on automated_pass. Wave 4 promotion remains BLOCKED pending human waiver decision on residual blockers.
phase_8_constant: output/eval_reasoning_v4_winner/judge_recalibration.json (score_offset=+3.58, applies_to=wp_judge overall, Phase-8 planning MUST consume)
